title: rubus × consequens
intro: Rubus × consequens is a hybrid plant that belongs to the Rosaceae family, resulting from a cross between the European raspberry (Rubus idaeus) and the fragrant raspberry (Rubus fruticosus). The plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its astringent, anti-inflammatory, and antiseptic properties, which have been used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Rubus × consequens include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate digestive issues, and support the immune system. Rubus × consequens can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, as well as used in salves and creams, making it a versatile plant in traditional herbal medicine.
